entities.name: Triangulation
entities.context: Method for verifying integrity through consistent behavior across multiple modalities (voice, video, real-time interaction)

entities.name: Channel Consistency
entities.context: Principle that deception is cognitively expensive to maintain across different sensory channels with different physiological triggers

entities.name: Cross-channel Coherence
entities.context: Consistency of candidate narrative across voice, video, and real-time interaction; structural filter for 'performers'

entities.name: Hiring Process
entities.context: Process that should be designed to test for cross-channel coherence rather than just passing interviews

relationships.context: Triangulation method is based on the principle of channel consistency in human communication
Channel consistency manifests as cross-channel coherence requirement for candidates
Hiring should use triangulation to filter candidates who cannot maintain consistency across channels
Structural requirement of consistency leads to higher long-term retention and trust in hires
